title: Movie Quotes — quoted-string format
description: Raw format used by vilaboim/movie-quotes (https://github.com/vilaboim/movie-quotes, MIT). A flat JSON array where every entry is a string of the form: "Quote text." Movie Title. The field contract is derived from the package's own test suite (test.js). This schema was authored by DutchJaFO/Quotinator and may be proposed upstream.

items.description: Typically: '"Quote text." Movie Title'. Multi-character exchanges appear as a single combined string (e.g. 'Character: "..." Character: "..." Movie'). No strict pattern is enforced — the essential contract is a non-empty string array.
